texto: I'm one of those people who had Christmas and my birthday always combined, and generally, my birthday was pretty much ignored. But my parents are always good about making some kind of special effort to make me feel like I also have a birthday that exists.
explicacao: Metáfora atribuída a Noel Wells: compara elementos do cotidiano para falar de temas ligados a reflexao. O trecho “I'm one of those people who had Christmas and my birthday always combined, and generally, my birt…” usa imagem concreta para lembrar que reflexao, birthday, good pedem movimento e interpretação pessoal, em tom de aniversario e natal.

frase_original: I'm one of those people who had Christmas and my birthday always combined, and generally, my birthday was pretty much ignored. But my parents are always good about making some kind of special effort to make me feel like I also have a birthday that exists.
